title: Madison Park - Parks | seattle.gov
content: # Madison Park. Phone: (206) 684-4075 684-4075). ## Madison Park Attractions. people in an outdoor swimming pool. A man with a tennis racket on an outdoor court. Madison Park lawn - Photo by TIA International Photography. Madison Park beach with sunbathers - Photo by TIA International Photography. Madison Park play area - Photo by TIA International Photography. Madison Park is a lovely grassy park on the shores of Lake Washington, south of the Evergreen Point Bridge. The park features a bathhouse and swimming beach that is patrolled by lifeguards during the summer. Their grassy park slopes down to a 400-foot beach, with cement steps on the north and a short sandy portion on the south near a tall apartment building. The beach includes a bathhouse with restrooms, bike rack, and well-placed benches for parents to keep an eye on the children. The park offers a beautiful view to the East of the floating bridge and the Cascades beyond. Fax: (206) 615-1813 615-1813).
